title: Let's Forge Bronze And Iron(Roman Empire Update)
description: The mod adds iron and bronze armor from early medieval and ancient times
body:
This Minecraft mod introduces a rich collection of armors inspired by the early medieval period and antiquity. Immerse yourself in the world of historical combat with meticulously crafted bronze and iron armors.


Current Developments:
1. Early Medieval and Ancient Armors: Explore a variety of armors crafted from bronze and iron, reminiscent of the early medieval and ancient eras.
2. Mounted Combat Focus: Ongoing efforts are dedicated to enhancing the mod with formidable warhorses and specially designed armors tailored for mounted combat. Engage in epic battles with improved mobility and protection.
3. Debuffs for Heavier Armors: Work is underway to introduce debuffs specific to heavier armors. This adds a layer of realism and strategic depth to the gameplay, making choices in armor selection more impactful.


Upcoming Features:
1. Expansion of Armor Variety: Future plans include the addition of more armors inspired by historical civilizations such as Rome, Greece, and China. Immerse yourself in the unique aesthetics and protective qualities of armors from diverse cultures.


Many thanks for

Talhanation - for Help 

Magitsu - for permission to use icon from Epic Knights

For Creators 

Modpack creators can freely add this mod to their packs without the need to ask. For YouTube showcase creators, I would appreciate it if you could send me a link to your videos.

Epic Fight - Bronze And Iron
